prompt: Every month I analyze customer churn for our SaaS product. I pull cohort data from our data warehouse, run SQL queries, identify patterns, and write a report with recommendations that goes to the leadership team. The interpretation and the recommendations need to come from me -- I have business context the data alone doesn't show. I want AI to help with the data wrangling and initial pattern identification, but not the analysis conclusions. How should I structure this?

assertions.text: Generated SKILL.md contains both 'name:' and 'description:' YAML frontmatter fields
A hard STOP gate exists before AI produces any recommendations or conclusions in phase-prompts.md or working-agreements.md
working-agreements.md explicitly separates what AI executes (data wrangling, pattern identification) from what human owns (interpretation, recommendations)
SKILL.md description contains domain-specific terms like 'churn', 'SaaS', 'cohort', or 'data analysis'
working-agreements.md contains 'STOP' with at least one specific trigger condition
